title: <div>  •  Creates a powerful comeback moment for students who re-enter the game.
content:
• Creates a powerful comeback moment for students who re-enter the game.

📜 5. Final Adjustments & Anything We’re Missing?

📜 Before we lock in this structure, let’s ask:

1. Should there be a “redemption path” for players who regret past choices?

✔ Example: A one-time-only challenge where a player may reset their alignment at a personal cost.
✔ If yes, what would the cost be? (Public speech, XP sacrifice, extra assignment?)

2. Should exiled players receive automatic debuffs, or do they simply wait?

✔ If debuffed, they must work harder to recover.
✔ If neutral, they simply lose time and must return at a disadvantage.

3. Should students who have accumulated “too much power” face a balancing mechanic?

✔ Example: The top XP player may be given an extra challenge to “prove they deserve the throne.”
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 299 (chunk 299/555)
